full_text:
Ying Shao (Zhongyuan) 應劭 (仲瑗)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Ying Shao (應劭), styledZhongyuan (仲瑗), was born in Runan. His historical work remain an important source of information on Later Han. Ying Shao was affiliated with the Han Dynasty, the Wei Kingdom, and Yuan Shao. Ying Shao lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
